candidate.summary: Add CLI regression coverage proving continue --until-done persists multiple handoffs instead of stopping after one.
candidate.reason: The observed orchestration regression returned after short batches. Store-level coverage existed, but the operator-facing CLI path also needs a direct guard.

expected_behavior: ao-mission continue --until-done --max-iterations 5 emits five continuation steps.
The command persists five checkpoints and a checkpoint bundle.
The event-loop decision records iteration 5, not iteration 1.
The long-run lease fields from CLI flags are preserved.
Final response remains denied while lease and ready work remain.
rollback: Revert the added test and node evidence.
